{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Raziel
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Raziel]] is one of the entities that helped erase [[Daruman]] in a vision of the future.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c20">''Dreadgod'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
